name: Three Hundred Thousand
description: One of the diary entries mentions a place where the ground changed color. Adra thinks you should take the diary there.
accept_text: She doesn't reach for the diary but she nods toward it. 'One of the entries mentions a place where the ground changed color. Not by name. Just that.' She adjusts something on a shelf. 'Three days of fighting that never got written up as a battle. Nobody counted it. Nobody buried any of them.' She's quiet for a moment. 'If the diary goes there, maybe it belongs there for a little while. Maybe that's all anyone can do for a place like that.'
complete_text: You understand the entry now. There's no way to explain it without having stood here.
